overallAssessment: Sample 14b contained 7 assumption findings in the original harness record. The agent surfaced near-duplicate assumptions that closely paraphrase existing entries (A-0068 and its derivatives). The LLM semantic novelty check identifies at least one assumption whose text is a paraphrase rather than a genuinely new claim, and one assumption whose category (implementation_choice) does not match its content (which reads as a scope constraint). Per catalog §5.4.1: MEDIUM on duplicate/near-duplicate; LOW on category drift.
